ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Random seed used for the experiment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the criterion used for clustering */,
  "geom_threshold" REAL /* Geometric threshold for clustering */,
  "warm_start_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warm start configuration */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clustering method used */,
  "K" INTEGER /* Number of clusters (K) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was conducted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., completed, failed, running) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "precomputed" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the experiment used precomputed results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES datasets ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES criteria ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_warm_start_id FOREIGN KEY ("warm_start_id") REFERENCES warm_starts ("warm_start_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "data_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "features" INTEGER /* Number of features in the dataset */,
  "records" INTEGER /* Number of records in the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., public repository, user upload) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criterion */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the criterion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criterion */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of criterion (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula or method used to compute the criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clustering method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the clustering method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clustering method */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of clustering method (e.g., partitioning, hierarchical, density-based) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON column to store default parameters for the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warm_starts" (
  "warm_start_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warm start configuration */,
  "warm_start_name" TEXT /* Name of the warm start configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the warm start configuration */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of warm start (e.g., initialization, continuation) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON column to store default parameters for the warm start */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warm_start_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "silhouette_score" REAL /* Silhouette score of the clustering result */,
  "dunn_index" REAL /* Dunn index of the clustering result */,
  "ari" INTEGER /* Adjusted Rand index (ARI) of the clustering result */,
  "runtime" REAL /* Runtime in seconds for the clustering method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., company, university) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment log */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the experiment in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
